fields.description: List of extra fields to be retrieved.

items.description: List of extra fields to be retrieved.

filters.description: Operational filters such as AND or OR.

key.description: The filter key. Key is required for the filters [EQ, NE, GT, LT, GTE, LTE, IN, NIN]

value_date.description: The filter value as a date, if provided will be preferred over the `value` field.

query_embedding.description: The list of embeddings, not required if `query_string` is provided.

items.description: The list of embeddings, not required if `query_string` is provided.

query_string.description: The query string, not required if the `query_embeddings` are provided. Please note that the `query_string` is ignored if the `query_embeddings` are provided.

query_uri.description: Perform a Vector Search based on similarities with an entity with the specified URI.

query_url.description: Perform a Vector Search based on similarities with an entity with the specified URL (schema:url).
